title: pteroon hoeijeri
side_effects: Pteroon hoeijeri can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in sensitive individuals. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can cause gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as stomach ulcers in extreme cases. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can also lead to skin irritation, including redness, inflammation, and blistering, particularly in people with pre-existing skin conditions. Improper handling and preparation of the plant can also result in liver and kidney damage, which may require medical attention.
